option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>asia.wjm</groupId> <artifactId>back-end</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> </parent>
<artifactId>molt-server</artifactId> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<name>molt-server</name> <description>Spring Boot Admin Server Module</description>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <spring-boot.version>3.2.5</spring-boot.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.5.5</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>asia.wjm</groupId> <artifactId>molt</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <modules> <module>molt-server</module> <module>molt-pojo</module> <module>molt-common</module> </modules> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.5.5</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>asia.wjm</groupId> <artifactId>molt</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <modules> <module>molt-server</module> <module>molt-pojo</module> <module>molt-common</module> </modules> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <packaging>pom</packaging>
</project>
